items.title: Mastercard's Earnings Preview: The Bar Is Set Quite High
Royal Caribbean, consumer confidence, Fed meeting: What to Watch
items.description: Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Tuesday, October 28, including earnings results from companies like Visa (V), UnitedHealth Group (UNH), and Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL); October's consumer confidence data; and the beginning of the Federal Reserve's October FOMC meeting, concluding on Wednesday with the latest decision around interest rates. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures steady near records with Trump trade moves, earnings in focus
items.description: Eyes are on Trump's visit to Japan in the wait for his meeting with China's Xi, as the flood of earnings continues to roll in.

items.title: Earnings live: Keurig Dr. Pepper stock pops, Waste Management and Whirlpool slip with Big Tech results on deck
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: JPMorgan could be the next $1 trillion dollar company, says Jim Cramer
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer breaks down the odds of which company may be the next to hit the $1 trillion market cap milestone.
